prestazioni: Replace the stock 4.0L DOHC 32-valve Aurora V8 (L47 engine code) with a fully built version featuring forged internals: Manley forged crankshaft (4.5" stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and JE forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) to handle forced induction. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system from Aviaid to prevent oil starvation under high lateral G-forces.

Install a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel) with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm) and a Tial MV-R 50mm external dump valve. Fabricate a custom intercooler setup using a PWR 4.5" thick core with CNC-machined aluminum end tanks, mounted in the front bumper with a custom ducting system to maximize airflow.

Swap the stock 4-speed automatic transmission for a Tremec T-56 Magnum XL 6-speed manual, paired with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (7.25" diameter) and a Quaife ATB differential. Upgrade the half-shafts to custom CV joints from The Driveshaft Shop (rated for 1,200 lb-ft of torque) and reinforce the transmission tunnel with a custom subframe brace from BMR Suspension.
estetica: Replace the stock body panels with a full carbon fiber widebody kit from RK Sport, featuring extended front fenders (2" wider), a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts, and a functional hood scoop to feed the intercooler. Paint the kit in a custom matte metallic "Shelby Silver" with gloss black accents and pinstriping by Stripes Unlimited.

Install a custom front splitter from APR Performance (3" overhang) with adjustable dive planes, paired with a carbon fiber rear wing from Varis (1,200mm width, 300mm chord) mounted on billet aluminum pedestals. Add a set of custom side skirts with integrated LED turn signals and a rear bumper with a central exhaust outlet for a dual 4" titanium exhaust system from Burns Stainless.

Upgrade the interior with a full Alcantara retrim by Katzkin, featuring custom Shelby Series 1 embroidery on the headrests and door panels. Install a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (8-point, bolt-in) with integrated harness bars for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Replace the stock gauges with a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada, mounted in a custom carbon fiber dash panel with a quick-release steering wheel from NRG Innovations (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped).
